tasks.title: Design user authentication system
tasks.description: Create wireframes and mockups for login, registration, and password reset flows

tasks.title: Implement JWT authentication
tasks.description: Set up JSON Web Token authentication with refresh tokens and secure cookie handling

tasks.title: Create task management API
tasks.description: Build RESTful endpoints for CRUD operations on tasks with proper validation

tasks.title: Implement drag and drop functionality
tasks.description: Add drag and drop capability for moving tasks between columns using @hello-pangea/dnd

tasks.title: Add task filtering and search
tasks.description: Implement search functionality and filters by column, priority, and date range

tasks.title: Optimize database queries
tasks.description: Review and optimize slow database queries, add proper indexing

tasks.title: Write unit tests for task service
tasks.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for all task service functions using Jest

tasks.title: Implement real-time updates
tasks.description: Add WebSocket support for real-time task updates across multiple clients

tasks.title: Add task comments feature
tasks.description: Allow users to add comments and attachments to tasks for better collaboration

tasks.title: Create user dashboard
tasks.description: Build a personalized dashboard showing task statistics and recent activity

tasks.title: Implement task priorities
tasks.description: Add priority levels (low, medium, high, urgent) with visual indicators

tasks.title: Add export functionality
tasks.description: Allow users to export tasks and reports to PDF, CSV, and Excel formats
